snippet: When considering a sponsorship request or offer, schools must assess it against the following sponsorship principles set by the Victorian Government sponsorship policy and guidelines External Link . Schools must not engage in sponsorship that is inappropriate, either through association or activity. The following activities or organisations must not be considered for sponsorship: . Commercial organisations can be considered for incoming sponsorships if the organisation is not associated with an inappropriate activity listed above. For outgoing sponsorships, schools must not sponsor any commercial organisations (excluding media organisations).
